## Wenxin Logos React Components

I'm an Agent

Send this prompt to your agent to use @lobehub/icons

```
Read https://lobehub.com/icons/skill.md and follow the instructions to use @lobehub/icons
```

Use the React icon package for more variant support, please refer to the following documentation: [@lobehub/icons](https://icons.lobehub.com/components/wenxin)

Wenxin

## Wenxin Logos React 组件

